description_long: This house features a rectangular, elongated structure with a low-pitched gable roof in a muted tan color. The exterior walls are painted white, accented by brown window shutters and a matching brown front door. The front facade displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows, with two stories and a central entryway. A prominent chimney is visible on one side, suggesting a fireplace inside. The windows are evenly spaced, and the house sits on a slightly raised foundation. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story, rectangular house with a tan gable roof, white walls, brown shutters, and a central front door. The design is symmetrical and features a prominent side chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical window arrangement, and brown shutters.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow end of the house with two vertically aligned windows and the sloped roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back windows and the chimney extending from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the chimney structure and two vertically aligned windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with a small step, flanked by windows and brown shutters, no porch or columns.
